Energy.label: Energy Function
Energy.focus_goal: Improve mitochondrial function and daily energy stability

bands.impact: Mitochondrial output critically suppressed — fatigue, inability to sustain activity

lifestyle: Eliminate intense training until score improves

bands.expected_outcome: Energy resilience improves and daily fatigue burden reduces over 6-8 weeks.

bands.impact: Sustained low-grade energy deficit — afternoon crashes, poor training recovery

nutrition: Reduce refined sugar and processed carbs
clinical: Review iron status and cortisol rhythm

bands.expected_outcome: More stable daily energy and fewer crashes in 4-6 weeks.

bands.impact: Energy pathways functioning below peak — performance ceiling limited
bands.expected_outcome: Energy score trends toward optimal range with sustained routine.

bands.impact: No active energy pathway disruption detected

lifestyle: Maintain current movement and sleep routine

bands.expected_outcome: Energy stability maintained.

bands.impact: Systemic inflammatory cascade active — tissue damage risk, recovery severely impaired

lifestyle: Prioritize stress reduction and sleep 8+ hours

bands.expected_outcome: Inflammatory symptom burden decreases and recovery improves over 6-8 weeks.

bands.impact: Persistent low-grade inflammation — accelerated tissue wear, fatigue amplification
bands.expected_outcome: Inflammation trend improves with lower tissue stress in 4-6 weeks.

bands.impact: Inflammation not yet disruptive but trending — left unchecked will escalate

lifestyle: Track stress and sleep debt weekly

bands.expected_outcome: Inflammation remains controlled and symptoms stay manageable.

bands.impact: No significant inflammatory signal detected
bands.expected_outcome: Inflammatory balance maintained.

bands.impact: Phase I/II detox pathways impaired — toxin accumulation driving fatigue and systemic stress

lifestyle: Reduce alcohol and toxin exposure immediately
Sauna or sweat-based detox protocols if tolerated

bands.expected_outcome: Improved detox resilience and lower sensitivity burden over 6-8 weeks.

bands.impact: Detox pathways underperforming — suboptimal clearance of metabolic waste

lifestyle: Prioritize sleep for liver clearance window
clinical: Liver enzyme check if symptoms persist

bands.expected_outcome: Detox efficiency improves with better tolerance and recovery.

bands.impact: Detox capacity adequate but not optimized — minor bottlenecks in clearance
bands.expected_outcome: Detox system trends toward stable optimal function.

bands.impact: No detox pathway disruption detected
bands.expected_outcome: Detox balance maintained.

Brain.label: Neurocognitive Function
Brain.focus_goal: Support cognitive resilience and neurotransmitter balance

bands.impact: Neurotransmitter synthesis and signaling critically disrupted — brain fog, mood instability, cognitive failure under load

lifestyle: Sleep consistency protocol — fixed wake/sleep times
nutrition: Increase tryptophan and tyrosine food sources

bands.expected_outcome: Improved cognitive clarity and stress tolerance over 6-8 weeks.

bands.impact: Cognitive performance under stress impaired — focus fragile, mood dysregulation present

nutrition: Protein timing across meals for neurotransmitter precursors

bands.expected_outcome: Better focus and mood stability in 4-6 weeks.

bands.impact: Cognitive function intact but not optimized — performance fluctuates with stress

nutrition: Maintain protein and healthy fat intake

bands.expected_outcome: Cognitive performance trends toward stable baseline.

bands.impact: No cognitive pathway disruption detected
bands.expected_outcome: Cognitive resilience remains stable.

Recovery.label: Recovery Capacity
Recovery.focus_goal: Improve tissue repair and recovery capacity

bands.impact: Tissue repair and adaptation mechanisms failing — injury risk elevated, training counterproductive

nutrition: Micronutrient optimization — zinc, magnesium, vitamin D

bands.expected_outcome: Recovery burden decreases and adaptation improves over 6-8 weeks.

bands.impact: Recovery window extended — insufficient tissue repair between stress cycles
bands.expected_outcome: Improved training recovery and less delayed soreness in 4-6 weeks.

bands.impact: Recovery pathway efficiency below peak — adaptation occurring but suboptimally

nutrition: Ensure adequate dietary zinc and magnesium

bands.expected_outcome: Recovery trends toward optimal baseline.

bands.impact: No recovery pathway disruption detected
bands.expected_outcome: Recovery stability maintained.
